title: Safety Data Sheet
scenario: Create a safety data sheet for a hazardous chemical. The sheet should include information on the chemical's properties, handling procedures, and emergency response procedures. It should be concise and easy to read. Keep it under 500 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is under 500 words and uses clear headings.
Check if the text is clear, concise, and easy to read.
Check if the text includes the required information on the hazardous chemical.
